creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Version 4.4 is threadsafe and much faster than 3.1 because it does DNS on
the proxy side, instead of using a proxified TCP connection.
Support for TOR .onion URLs was added.

I don't have more isues with Version 4.4 with email as with 3.1 before,
to not sometimes can connect to POP3 servers.
